business_ideas.idea: Buy-and-build roll-ups in services (plumbing, HVAC, property management)

predictions.text: AI will become commoditized in most industries; talent and operations matter more than technology moat
AI-native apps getting attacked by LLMs introducing new products; venture-backed apps at inflated valuations going to zero
Services roll-ups with deep customer relationships will win with AI as tailwind
Alpine plumbing rollup grew from $8M to $500M EBITDA in 6 years through systematic acquisition and talent
